description: Captures Power Automate ↔ Copilot Studio request/response payloads keyed by cr_correlationid. Rows are populated by the flow-1-log-agent-trace child flow and the tool-log-agent-trace tool flow when the cr_DebugLoggerEnabled environment variable is true.

columns.description: Primary key. Auto-generated GUID for each trace record.
Primary column — short human-readable label generated by the flow via concat(source, '/', step_name, ' @ ', utcNow()). NOT a Dataverse formula; populated explicitly by the flow per A1.

Correlation key stitching Copilot Studio topic events with Power Automate flow events. Default value = System.Conversation.Id from the calling topic; the maker may override by packing a `correlation_id` field into the existing serialized JSON input passed through ExecuteAgentAndWait.
Name of the calling Copilot Studio agent (e.g. 'Intelligent Work Layer'). Optional — populated by the caller.
Which side of the call generated this trace row.
Name of the originating flow or topic (e.g. 'flow-1-log-agent-trace', 'log-chain-of-thoughts'). Optional.
Name of the discrete step within the source (e.g. 'ExecuteAgentAndWait', 'CoT', 'ConversationHistory'). Optional.
Whether this row captures the inbound request, the outbound response, or an in-flight event.
Caller-supplied integer starting at 1. Per-caller tie-breaker only — NOT a global step counter across PA + CS callers (A8 — see maker-guide Pattern A/B warning).

JSON-serialized inputs/outputs from the captured step. Raw, no redaction. **Truncated to 900,000 characters before write (A15)** via Power Automate `left(string(triggerBody()?['payload']), 900000)`. Customer adds PII redaction at UAT/prod.
Step duration in milliseconds. Populated on RESPONSE rows only.
Outcome of the captured step. Default `OK`; populated by the flow.

notes.design_rationale: UserOwned for row-level security: makers see only their own traces. Custom timestamp (`cr_capturedat`) and user (`cr_userid`) columns intentionally OMITTED — system `createdon` and `OwnerId` cover both per v5 plan §1.
notes.security: Built-in System Customizer / Maker roles per D8 — no custom roles for v1. Customer adds per-user / per-agent role scopes at UAT/prod.
notes.system_columns: Standard Dataverse system columns (createdon, modifiedon, OwnerId, statecode, statuscode) are created automatically and do not need to be defined here. v5 plan §1 explicitly removes prior-draft custom cr_capturedat and cr_userid columns in favour of the system equivalents.
